name: Italian Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Chop onions into chewable size.
3. Cut 4 slices of bread into small crouton size and bake until golden. Set aside.
4. Saute onions in butter on low heat until soft and dark brown, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
5. In a saucepan, heat the beef broth cans plus 1 can of water until it reaches a slight boil.
6. Add Italian bread crumbs and sautéed onions to the saucepan and simmer briefly.
7. Pour the mixture into soup bowls.
8. Add Parmesan cheese and croutons on top of each bowl.
9. Place mozzarella cheese slices on top of each bowl.
10. Bake until the cheese is crisp and brown.
11. Let sit for a few minutes before serving.
